Geese.Title: Geese
Geese.NewsTitle: Geese attack the Crescent Moon Port!
Geese.NewsFull:
[i]-By Astrid Raveana[/i]
Early saturday morning, a flock of endangered red tailed geese nearly ten thousand strong descended on the Crescent Moon Port in Xiadia. The port makes up 14% of all imports into Xiadia, and over 80% of imports for the industrial region of Delgana that the port resides in. In response to the crisis, Delgana governer Yugong Shei ordred the port closed until animal control could safely evacuate the endangered birds. animal and wildlife specialist Luon Yuok explained the situation "What we're seing now is a response to aggressive habitat destruction in the Delgana region." She continued. "When these native birds migrate back to the region after winter, they must create new nests, places like docks, that have alot of the same shade they'd look for in marshes and forests, naturally attract the aggressive species." Conservationsts are already starting the long legal battle with Xiadian courts and the ICA to get legal protections for the native homes of these animals. Critics, meanwhile, argue that the region's swift industrialization has lifted millions out of poverty and that these measures might harm the local economy and corporations. In an official statement, a spokesperson for Pelgratan Clean announced that the company would be scaling back operations in the region as a response to the environmental damage.

BorderWar.Title: BorderWar
BorderWar.NewsTitle: Ambernesia and Drastara clash at Minthol
BorderWar.NewsFull: Members of the Rozbójnik Osin earlier today opened fires on the Ambernesian national guard near the city of Minthol. Although the city is technically owned by Drastara, it is unclear whether the Ambernesian patrol was infringing on Drastaran territory. Nontheless, the current president of Drastara, insitated only a month after the mysterious death of the last one, made no comment on the situation.

EmbassyBombed.Title: EmbassyBombed
EmbassyBombed.NewsTitle: The Ambernesian Embassy in Drastara bombed!
EmbassyBombed.NewsFull:
Boris Kuznetsov, leader of the D.P.A, one of the largest paramilitary groups running Drastara, addressed the bombing of the sole Ambernesian embassy in Drastara. In his profanity laden speech, he declared "

	[i] Today, Drastaran nationals, carrying the flag of the confederacy, heroically stormed the [explative] laden den of snakes in the glorious city of Zhelmov. They carried out their actions alone... [but] they have lit the spark to a fire that will not go out until all of [Ambernesia] lies in ruin."

	 [b] "Until all of [Ambernesia] lies in ruin" [/b][/i]

TroopMovement.Title: TroopMovement
TroopMovement.NewsTitle: Mass Moblization in both Drastara and Ambernesia
TroopMovement.NewsFull: Throughout saturday night, i was kept awake in the news van by a low consistent thumping. Turning to my side, i closed my eyes desperately, attempting to shut out the noise with physical effort. [i] Thump. Thump. [/i] Quietly, i resigned myself, as the civillians of Minthol had, to a sleepless night. This artillery barrage makes up the soundscape around the historic, normally beautiful town of Minthol. Recently, as tensions between the countries have escalated, this pitter-patter of thumping has accelerated, troops now from both sides, numbering in the tens of thousands line up on opposite sides of the city. That morning, we awake to a tank brigade from Drastara making a daring charge across the grasslands on the eastern side of the city. [i] Brrrrrrrt. [/i] A helicopter swiftly dispactches the lead vehicle, missiles barrage the retreating brigade, now one down. The grass burns with an ominous red glare, as the fires of war consume Minthol, the hope of a diplomatic end to the war burn with it.

Descalation.Title: Descalation
Descalation.NewsTitle: Peace Talks Between Ambernesia and Drastara
Descalation.NewsFull: Peace summits at the ICA headquarters have begun. Although the area around Minthol remains dangerous, our on the ground reporter is adamant that the situation is descelating

CelebrityDeathA.Title: CelebrityDeathA
CelebrityDeathA.NewsFull: Samantha Harvey Bercha, grandaughter of Milos Bercha and successful singer-songwriter was found in her studio apartment earlier today ripped to shreds by a vicious pack of geese!

Sphere.Title: Sphere
Sphere.NewsTitle: Mysterious Object off the Coast of Praxtoria
Sphere.NewsFull: A strange oblong sphere was found floating off the coast of the Catarius Beach earlier this week. Dr. Dain explores the object in an exclusive interview with the Praxtoria News Network.

Pirates.Title: Pirates
Pirates.NewsFull: A pirate fleet consisting of 8 ships, multiple over 300m in length attacked a Flaeton Shipping convoy valued at well over $130 Million Pax. Cautiously, Flaeton shipping has begun negotiations for the return of the ships and goods, especially the wheat shipment to Paxtoria.
